_meta.source: robustness_grid (research/pick_breakout_config.py) — chosen for consistency across target/stop plateau at the true band cross; optimizer overfits this small (~140-event) dataset.
_meta.note: Delta-proxy P&L on the underlying (no theta). Live now buys the nearest-ATM strike that fits CAPITAL_PER_TRADE (default ₹18k → ~1 ATM lot) at 4-12 DTE. ATM chosen because the breakout edge survives a realistic ATM bid-ask (PF ~1.18, research/revalidate_model.py) whereas far-OTM under a ₹5k cap does not (PF ~0.95). Large vega: P&L is sensitive to intraday IV drift.
